com.hp.workpath.api.job

Class JobInfo

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.hp.workpath.api.job.JobInfo
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    android.os.Parcelable, com.hp.workpath.api.Convertor

    public final class JobInfo
extends java.lang.Object
implements android.os.Parcelable, com.hp.workpath.api.Convertor
    Provides the jobtype to distinguish print and scan, jobstate to get the current status and jobdata to retrieve job details.
    Since:
    API 1

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      static interface  JobInfo.JobData
      Provides interface for specific job details
      static interface  JobInfo.JobState
      Provides interface for specific job state
      static class  JobInfo.JobType
      Defines job types of submitted jobs

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      long getCompleteTime()
      Returns time after finishing a job
      <T extends JobInfo.JobData>
      T      		 getJobData()
      Returns job type specific details.
      Result is an instance of PrintJobData or ScanJobData or CopyJobData
      java.lang.String getJobId()
      Returns jobId
      java.lang.String getJobName()
      Returns jobname
      JobInfo.JobType getJobType()
      Returns jobType : print or scan or copy
      java.lang.String getOwner()
      Returns owner who starts a job
      long getStartTime()
      Returns time for starting a job

        Returns owner who starts a job

        String job owner

      • getStartTime

        public long getStartTime()
        Returns time for starting a job
        Returns:
        long time when job started (UTC)
        Since:
        API 1

      • getCompleteTime

        public long getCompleteTime()
        Returns time after finishing a job
        Returns:
        long time when job completed (UTC)
        Since:
        API 1

      • getJobData

        public <T extends JobInfo.JobData> T getJobData()
        Returns job type specific details.
        Result is an instance of PrintJobData or ScanJobData or CopyJobData
        Returns:
        JobData job specific details
        Since:
        API 1
